summary.universe_description: Top-100 lists filtered to S&P members as-of each trade day
summary.pit_warning: Change log covers 2008-09-15..2025-06-09; window 2023-01-15..2026-05-19 extends outside — membership outside log dates is approximate.
summary.survivorship_bias_note: PIT filter removes names not in the index on each day; delisted names only appear if listed in sp500_changes.csv.
